hibernate-mapping.query: select edf from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EffectiveDepositFrequency edf join edf.PaymentTemplateFrequency ptf join fetch edf.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplate capt join capt.CompanyAgency where capt.CompanyAgency.Agency = :agency and capt.PaymentTemplate = :paymentTemplate and ptf.PaymentFrequencyId = :paymentFrequencyId and edf.EffectiveDate <= :effectiveDate and edf.InvalidDate is null and edf.EffectiveDate >= ( select max(edf_all.EffectiveDate) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EffectiveDepositFrequency edf_all where edf_all.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplate = capt and edf_all.EffectiveDate <= :effectiveDate and edf_all.InvalidDate is null) order by capt desc, edf.EffectiveDate desc
